tool.name: tech_fingerprinter
tool.description: Identify technologies, frameworks, and versions from HTTP responses.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze HTTP headers for technology signatures - Analyze response body for framework fingerprints - Full analysis of headers and body - Focus on framework identification

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The fingerprinting action: - analyze_headers: Analyze HTTP headers only - analyze_body: Analyze response body only - full_analysis: Complete analysis of headers and body - identify_framework: Focus on framework identification

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: HTTP response headers as a dictionary. Required for analyze_headers.

parameter.name: body
parameter.description: HTTP response body content. Required for analyze_body.

returns.description: Detected technologies with confidence levels and sources

tool.examples:
# Analyze headers
analyze_headers {"Server": "nginx/1.18.0", "X-Powered-By": "PHP/7.4"}
# Analyze body
analyze_body <html>...wp-content...</html>
# Full analysis
full_analysis {"Server": "nginx"} <html>...</html>
